subcodes.first_line: O Desired One! Ever have the Messengers been guides upon the paths, and they are the Manifestations of Truth amidst creation and the Dawning-Places of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مراد لازال هادی سبل رسل بوده اند و ایشانند مظاهر حق بین خلق و مطالع اسماء
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @wisdom [hikmat], @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
